privileged_info_summary: The task 'create_note@1' is a Nuxeo Platform 10.10 document creation task that uses real Nuxeo infrastructure (verified version exists on Docker Hub). It runs against a PostgreSQL 11 database on port 8080 with Administrator credentials. The task requires creating a Note document (a built-in Nuxeo document type with note:note property for content) titled 'Meeting Minutes - October 2023' in the Projects workspace at path /default-domain/workspaces/Projects. The note content must include text about action items from an October 2023 team meeting. The environment uses the nuxeo-web-ui package for the web interface. All claimed infrastructure, document types, and properties have been verified against Nuxeo documentation and actual setup scripts.
